input.prompt:
My xUnit.net project uses xunit 2.9.3 with xunit.runner.visualstudio on VSTest.
I want to switch to Microsoft.Testing.Platform. What should I do?

data.transformedContent:
<current_datetime>2026-05-14T01:04:29.730Z</current_datetime>

My xUnit.net project uses xunit 2.9.3 with xunit.runner.visualstudio on VSTest.
I want to switch to Microsoft.Testing.Platform. What should I do?

input.initialPrompt:
My xUnit.net project uses xunit 2.9.3 with xunit.runner.visualstudio on VSTest.
I want to switch to Microsoft.Testing.Platform. What should I do?

data.content:
Here's what you need to do:

**1. Update package references** in your `.csproj`:

```xml
<!-- Remove -->
<PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="..." />

<!-- Add -->
<PackageReference Include="xunit.v3.runner.console" Version="1.*" />
```

> **Important:** MTP support requires **xUnit.net v3**. You'll need to migrate from xunit 2.9.3 → `xunit.v3` (the v3 package). Key v3 changes:
> - `xunit` → `xunit.v3`
> - `Xunit` namespace → `Xunit`
> - Some attribute/API changes (e.g., `[MemberData]` works differently, `IAsyncLifetime` returns `ValueTask`)

**2. Replace packages:**

```xml
<!-- Remove -->
<PackageReference Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
<PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="..." />

<!-- Add -->
<PackageReference Include="xunit.v3" Version="1.*" />
```

**3. Enable MTP** in your `.csproj`:

```xml
<PropertyGroup>
  <UseMicrosoftTestingPlatform>true</UseMicrosoftTestingPlatform>
</PropertyGroup>
```

**4. Run tests** with:

```bash
dotnet test          # still works
dotnet run           # also works — MTP makes test projects executable
```

**Key migration notes (xUnit v2 → v3):**

| Area | v2 | v3 |
|---|---|---|
| Package | `xunit` | `xunit.v3` |
| Runner | `xunit.runner.visualstudio` | Built-in (MTP native) |
| `IAsyncLifetime` | Returns `Task` | Returns `ValueTask` |
| `Assert.ThrowsAsync` | `Task` | `ValueTask` supported |
| `[Theory]` empty data | Passes | Fails (by design) |

**Alternatively**, if you want MTP **without** migrating to xUnit v3, you can use the compatibility layer:

```xml
<PackageReference Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
<PackageReference Include="xunit.runner.visualstudio" Version="3.1.*" />
```

`xunit.runner.visualstudio` **v3.x** supports MTP while still running xUnit v2 tests — this is the least-effort path.

Would you like help with the actual migration of your project files?
data.reasoningText: The user wants to migrate their xUnit.net project from VSTest (using xunit.runner.visualstudio) to Microsoft.Testing.Platform (MTP). Let me provide a concise answer based on my knowledge of this migration path.
